overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim navigating a bustling medieval Middle Eastern marketplace. The character moves through narrow streets lined with pottery and textile stalls, transitions through courtyards with hay bales, and emerges into open plazas with Islamic architecture, palm trees, and distant domes under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with pottery and brassware stalls

events.description: pedestrian in dark robes passes close to camera on the left side
approaching and passing under a large red fabric canopy stretched across the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the crowded market street, navigating between pedestrians and merchant stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside pottery stall arranging clay urns
woman in long green dress walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: wooden shelving units stacked with red clay pots, urns, and ceramic vessels
low table displaying shiny golden brass vases and metal vessels
tan-colored stone and mud brick buildings with wooden lattice windows and arched doorways
large red fabric awning stretched between buildings providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow bustling market street lined with merchants. Pottery stalls with clay urns occupy the left side while brass vessels are displayed on the right. Pedestrians move in both directions through the sandy street, and a red fabric canopy stretches overhead ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage transitioning to residential courtyard

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the red fabric canopy overhead
ascending worn stone stairs on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking under the fabric canopy and ascending stone stairs into a quieter courtyard area

notable_agents.action: man in green robe sweeping the ground with a broom

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward to a higher courtyard level
stacked rectangular hay bales wrapped in white cloth
large cylindrical wooden storage barrels bound with metal rings

segments.scene_description: Moving under the red canopy, the lighting shifts to dappled shade. The character turns left and ascends stone stairs into a quieter courtyard area where hay bales and wooden barrels are stored. A man sweeps the ground nearby as the market crowds thin out.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage courtyard with hay bales leading to decorated archway exit

events.description: exiting through the blue tiled archway into a large open plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating through the storage courtyard and passing through the decorated archway into the open square

notable_agents.action: child in green tunic walking alongside the character

entered.detail: decorative archway with intricate blue geometric mosaic tile patterns
large teal-green fabric awning suspended between wooden poles
grand stone building with multiple horseshoe arches and decorative Islamic stonework

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the courtyard filled with hay bales and storage goods, passing a child on the left. Approaching a beautifully decorated archway with blue tiles, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza with a grand stone building featuring horseshoe arches and green banners ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with market stalls transitioning to main commercial street

events.description: horse with rider passes by from right to left across the plaza
turning onto the main street with view of the distant green dome

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza and turning onto the main street, passing merchants and a horse rider

notable_agents.action: brown horse being led by handler across the plaza

entered.detail: large mosque or palace with prominent green copper dome and white minarets
tall date palm tree with spreading fronds casting shadows on the ground
wooden market stall with hanging fabrics and folded textiles

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a wide sunlit plaza, the character crosses toward a grand building with green banners. A horse is led across the open space. Turning onto the main street, a magnificent green dome becomes visible in the distance between palm trees and market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street leading to fortified city gate

events.description: slowing down and coming to a stop near the carpet vendor

agents.ego_description: walking down the main street toward the city gate and slowing to a stop near a carpet stall

notable_agents.action: vendor in white turban and green apron arranging carpets

entered.detail: massive fortified city gate with pointed archway and crenellated towers
colorful stacked Persian rugs and carpets with geometric patterns displayed on the ground
wooden construction scaffolding against the side of a building

segments.scene_description: Walking down the herringbone-patterned main street, the character approaches an impressive fortified gate. Palm tree shadows stretch across the ground. The character slows and stops near a vendor arranging colorful carpets, with the massive city gate looming ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, bustling market street into a wide, sunlit urban plaza and toward a fortified city gate. It begins by navigating a narrow sandy lane lined with pottery and brass stalls, moving forward until the bright light shifts to dappled shade beneath a red fabric canopy. As the character turns and ascends stone stairs, the crowded market thins into a quiet courtyard filled with hay bales and wooden barrels before passing through a blue-tiled archway. The scene then opens into a vast, sun-drenched plaza featuring grand horseshoe arches and green banners, where the camera tracks across the open space toward a distant green dome framed by palm trees. Finally, the movement follows a herringbone-patterned street past carpet vendors, ending as the camera slows before a massive, looming fortified gate.
